chunks.text: What are the AI tools that I am familiar with?

chunks.title: Video_6
chunks.text: I am familiar with DALI for image generation.

chunks.title: Video_6
chunks.text: For LLM models, right now I am working with Gemini.

chunks.title: Video_6
chunks.text: And recently I have started working with Cloud.

chunks.title: Video_6
chunks.text: And I think for now, for code generation,

chunks.title: Video_6
chunks.text: I think DeepSync would be my first preference.

chunks.title: Video_6
chunks.text: I have the premium for both of them.

chunks.title: Video_6
chunks.text: And recently I have started using Cloud.

chunks.title: Video_6
chunks.text: I think based on my research,

chunks.title: Video_6
chunks.text: Cloud will even go further than this.

text: What are the AI tools that I am familiar with? I am familiar with DALI for image generation. For LLM models, right now I am working with Gemini. I am working with ChatGPT. I am working with DeepSync. And recently I have started working with Cloud. And I think for now, for code generation, I think DeepSync would be my first preference. Gemini is good. ChatGPT is also good. I have the premium for both of them. And recently I have started using Cloud. I think based on my research, Cloud will even go further than this.
